reasoning: The control AC-2 (9) focuses on restricting the use of shared and group accounts, which translates in Kubernetes to ensuring that service accounts are not shared across different applications or teams without proper isolation. This can be enforced by ensuring that service accounts are not overly permissive and are not used in a shared manner. Additionally, individual user roles should be configured to ensure accountability and traceability of actions within the cluster.
title: Account Management | Restrictions on Use of Shared and Group Accounts
